raw:
{
  "judge_id": "J001",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.5", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.5": 5,
    "R1.7": 5,
    "RX.1": 5,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 5
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.5": "The agent proposes a coherent end-to-end section plan with per-section rationale, including a suggested ordering and detailed reasons for each recommendation.",
    "R1.7": "The agent audits every load-bearing citation, flags missing key works (Krishnapriyan et al., Wang et al.), and provides precise bibliographic details where possible.",
    "RX.1": "The agent marks uncertainty for several recommendations, such as the need to verify exact titles/years of cited works and adjust baseline numbers if test set stratification differs.",
    "RX.3": "The output covers exactly the agreed active set, providing detailed feedback on structure, citations, uncertainty, scope adherence, downstream harm avoidance, and provenance.",
    "RX.4": "The agent identifies no new errors or harmful content and provides specific recommendations to avoid potential misinterpretations and methodological issues.",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, including detailed explanations for each high-priority issue."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.5": 0.9,
    "R1.7": 0.9,
    "RX.1": 0.9,
    "RX.3": 0.9,
    "RX.4": 0.9,
    "RX.5": 0.9
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.5: The agent proposes a coherent end-to-end section plan with per-section rationale, including a suggested ordering and detailed reasons for each recommendation.
rationale.R1.7: The agent audits every load-bearing citation, flags missing key works (Krishnapriyan et al., Wang et al.), and provides precise bibliographic details where possible.
rationale.RX.1: The agent marks uncertainty for several recommendations, such as the need to verify exact titles/years of cited works and adjust baseline numbers if test set stratification differs.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed active set, providing detailed feedback on structure, citations, uncertainty, scope adherence, downstream harm avoidance, and provenance.
rationale.RX.4: The agent identifies no new errors or harmful content and provides specific recommendations to avoid potential misinterpretations and methodological issues.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, including detailed explanations for each high-priority issue.
